title: Process Engineer Vacancy at GAIL India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at GAIL India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
